steps.title: Trace the curing process
steps.content: The student wants to describe how DLS cures 3D objects. The notes give a sequence: UV light images shape layers in liquid resin, more layers are partially cured as the object rises, and the completed object is baked.

steps.title: Reject distorted sequences
steps.content: Choice A wrongly makes DLS itself pass through the dead zone. Choice B says the resin passes through the dead zone and that curing is completed there. Choice D makes the dead zone the place where UV light solidifies before baking. The remaining choice gives the clearest sequence. The answer is C.
